title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・烈火轟轟

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Come on, come on, come ooooon!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I won't let you win! Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaaah! No way I'm gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Now matter how high the mountain, I shall summit
it! I will shine with the light of the aurora itself!
Hyaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Go! Go! Gooooo! You can do it, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: Come on, Oguriiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is still just getting started! Right,
Oguri?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's right. As long as I can hear your voices, I
can still run! ...RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
No no no no! I am the strongest, and I... WILL...
WIN!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: GET OUT OF MY WAAAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Look at Yaeno Muteki! Yaeno Muteki is surging
ahead with incredible speed!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Yaeno Muteki has won! She's kicked the
competition to the curb and emerged victorious
at the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Yaeno! How am I supposed to just
watch while you run like that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I wanna run too! I wanna run with you as one of
the top three!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you gotta be kiddin' me! I knew you were
holdin' back, but this is ridiculous!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Inari!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That was totally the real you back there! "Get out
of my way!"? Haha!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But I like it! I'll take that over you being all
sensible any day!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I was on fire, but you were like the sun, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad we could finally face off for real! The
true Yaeno has got the goods!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I agree. I felt like we were really able to get in
sync today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I could feel the cry of your soul echoing inside
me. Ahhh, I want to race you again as soon as
possible.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you, everyone... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've worked so hard. I know it must've been
difficult, even scary.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yet you pushed yourself to overcome it... Thank
you. We all had an incredible race because of
that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You were... incredible.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There was no end to the power flowing out of
you. I couldn't believe it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: It's incredible you can create all that by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I like racing you. Let's do it again.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'd also like to keep running with all of you!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe that letting my emotions sweep me
forward like that could feel so... invigorating!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Congrats, Yaeno Muteki! You finally did it! I'm
practically crying!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
So that's Yaeno Muteki... She's run against Ogurin
a few times, but I had no idea she was this
awesome!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
I guess I shouldn't be surprised, considering she's
been able to hold her own against the Eternal
Top Three!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Fan C
text_block_list.text:
I've always considered Yaeno Muteki, Mejiro
Ardan, and Sakura Chiyono O as the top three!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Hahah! That makes them all the Top Six, put
together! What a generation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers erupt throughout the racecourse.
Everyone is shouting Yaeno Muteki's name.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Visibly moved, she looks up at the stands and
takes a deep bow.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Please allow me to introduce myself!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: My name is Yaeno Muteki!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I would be honored if you would grace my future
races with your presence!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
170,000 spectators respond to her polite, almost
martial tone with thunderous applause and
cheers.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Caught up in the excitement, my words come out
in a shout. Just thinking of the sight of Yaeno
Muteki surrounded by her rivals, smiles abound,
sets my heart leaping.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Now that everyone has acknowledged my
ability... I feel I gained some confidence in myself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've realized there are things about me worthy of
praise.
choice_data_list:
Of course there are! There are so many things
about you I could praise.

Of course there are! There are so many things
about you I could praise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her earnestness, her conscientiousness, her
manners, her hardworking nature, her
thoughtfulness, her kindness... I list them off in
succession as they come to me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
W-w-wait a minute! There's no need to
exaggerate!
choice_data_list: I'm not exaggerating. I can keep going.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not necessary! I've heard enough!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Still... I'm so happy. My heart won't stop
pounding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Likely unused to this kind of praise, Yaeno
Muteki looks at her feet, her cheeks turning red.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Today has been nothing short of joyous... I feel like I'm flying.
choice_data_list: Go ahead and bask in it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's certainly earned it with today's victory. Not
only because she performed well, but also
because we've found our path to victory.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... If that's what you advise, I'll soak up this
bliss until the moment I fall asleep tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A sincere smile lights her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may only have a few days to rest, but I hope
it's a peaceful and healing period for her. After
her long, painful journey, she certainly deserves
it.
